doctrine_note: Anchor partner outreach is DRAFT ONLY. Founder reviews + approves every send. NEVER autonomous. NEVER cold send. NEVER scraping. Cross-link: docs/40_partners/PARTNER_COVENANT.md.

partners.owner_role_to_target: PDPL/NDMO advisory partner OR governance practice lead
partners.value_to_partner: PDPL + NDMO compliance referral mechanism + Sprint delivery partner so the advisory keeps the consulting layer.
partners.rev_share_terms: 20% / first 12 months / capped at 200,000 SAR per closed referral. Partner Covenant binding.
partners.founder_action_required: Pick the specific company name + the specific contact + book a 60-min call. Use the bilingual draft in outreach_draft_ref. DRAFT ONLY — founder approval required before send.

partners.owner_role_to_target: Risk / Fraud / AML lead OR partnerships head
partners.value_to_partner: Governance + Trust Pack layer for processor's mid-market merchants who need PDPL audit trail without building it in-house.
partners.rev_share_terms: 20% / first 12 months / capped at 200,000 SAR per closed referral. Partner Covenant binding.
partners.founder_action_required: Pick the specific company name + the specific contact + book a 60-min call. Use the bilingual draft in outreach_draft_ref. DRAFT ONLY — founder approval required before send.

partners.owner_role_to_target: Portfolio operating partner OR platform lead

partners.rev_share_terms: 20% / first 12 months / capped at 200,000 SAR per closed referral. Partner Covenant binding.
